Plastic Squeegee

★★★★★

Read All Reviews

Plastic squeegees are used for the application of vinyl decals. They are made from a sturdy, flat plastic that is easy to manuver when applying decals.

Squeegee dimensions: 4"x3"

(Min: 1, Max: 25)
